
## HW3A

<div style="height: 400px !important; max-height: 400px !important; overflow-y: scroll !important;">

```{r}
#| label: hw3-points-table
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
hw3_url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vQ6bHq2sBtMyL5TiOIl2zVqPdAL9B4tdNwlPdkm1QGnVuOFXb7GfYx-fCVTWxCepWtnQAQIvqAJvwSM/pub?output=csv"
gen_points_table(hw3_url)
```

</div>
